| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek:

In 2020, we'll elect our next president, replacing Donald Trump with a strong, thoughtful leader who we can be proud of -- a leader who we can point to as a role model for our kids, and who we can trust to represent us on a global stage.

**But before we get there, we've got some work to do right here in Virginia!** This November, we'll be one of just four states that heads to the polls to elect our state legislative representatives. All 140 seats in the Virginia General Assembly are up, and we've got a BIG opportunity in front of us. Right now, Republicans just narrowly hold control of each legislative chamber -- if we can flip two House of Delegates seats and two Virginia Senate seats, we will take those majorities. [**Add your name right now if you're ready to flip the General Assembly on November 5th.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f174f/3e0906/7bf0099a/3e30b82a/1299421609/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/flip-the-virginia-general-assembly?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name+right+now+if+youre+ready+t&utm_campaign=20190423_1_PET_TEAM_VA-Dem-Caucuses&source=20190423_1_PET_TEAM_VA-Dem-Caucuses")

Derek: Gaining a majority in the legislature isn't just about winning on Election Day. It's about finally being able to write, pass, and reform legislation that will help families all across the Commonwealth succeed. With Democratic majorities, Virginia could be the 38th state to ratify the Equal Rights Amendment. With Democratic majorities, we could reduce gun violence in our neighborhoods. We could prevent employment discrimination against LGBTQ Virginians. We could enact policies that protect our environment for future generations.

These are the kinds of things that Tim is working on at a federal level in the U.S. Senate, but the path to true progress also goes through state legislatures. The fact is, we've got to have leaders at _every_ level of government who are fighting for our shared values. So we're asking: [**Will you sign on to support the Virginia House Democratic Caucus and the Virginia Senate Democratic Caucus in their fight to flip the General Assembly?**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f174f/3e0906/7bf0099a/3e30b829/1299421609/VEsF/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/flip-the-virginia-general-assembly?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+Will+you+sign+on+to+support+the+Virginia&utm_campaign=20190423_1_PET_TEAM_VA-Dem-Caucuses&source=20190423_1_PET_TEAM_VA-Dem-Caucuses")

State legislative races can be won and lost on the power of a single vote. (Remember the infamous coin toss tiebreaker in 2017?) You've been a trusted supporter of Tim for the long haul, and it's that dedicated support that will make the difference on November 5th, 2019.

**Click this secure link to add your name if you're ready to WIN in Virginia this year:** [**https://secure.timkaine.com/Flip-the-GA**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f174f/3e0906/7bf0099a/3e30b828/1299421609/VEsC/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/flip-the-virginia-general-assembly?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+httpssecuretimkainecomFliptheGA&utm_campaign=20190423_1_PET_TEAM_VA-Dem-Caucuses&source=20190423_1_PET_TEAM_VA-Dem-Caucuses")

Thanks for all you do! Tim -- and our entire team -- truly appreciates your commitment to a Virginia that works for all.

-Team Kaine **** **** **** **** **** **** **** **** **** **** **** **** **** **** **** **** **** **** **** **** **** ****

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/6285103/56911108/683764388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDM2YjZiZC1iOTY2LWU5MTEtYjQ5ZS0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ATdVSBBrkRAedih8i7SXlfBiWv1BjxsrFZK8zPks8p8=)
---
Peter,

I wanted to talk to you about healthcare. The Affordable Care Act is an important law that extends healthcare to millions of Americans and provides patient rights for all of us. Through subsidized plans and protections for pre-existing conditions, Obamacare saves lives and secures families from economic ruin. In late March, the Department of Justice reversed course and sought to invalidate the entire law. This latest move is part of a years-long Republican attack on the ACA that has included political campaigns, House and Senate votes, multiple lawsuits, and the appointment of federal judges hostile to this life-saving law. In the Texas 10th Congressional District, incumbent Michael McCaul issued an April 4 press release trying to distance himself from his Republican colleagues. He wrote, “I remain steadfast in my principles for our healthcare system: lower premiums and out-of-pocket costs, while maintaining protections for people with pre-existing conditions.” Unfortunately, McCaul’s comments appear to be motivated more by self-preservation than regard for human life. He himself voted to repeal, deauthorize, defund or otherwise destroy the Affordable Care Act on at least 10 occasions, repeatedly voting to gut the Act entirely, including its protections for pre-existing conditions. After endangering millions of Americans with pre-existing conditions, and after saying nothing to a Republican Administration that has increased the cost of insurance through its repeated attacks on Obamacare, McCaul’s words ring hollow. Like so many of us, I know the importance of the ACA from personal experience. [_**Nothing is more powerful than our stories. Do you have a healthcare story that you would like the campaign to share?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/6285104/56911109/163234627?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDM2YjZiZC1iOTY2LWU5MTEtYjQ5ZS0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ATdVSBBrkRAedih8i7SXlfBiWv1BjxsrFZK8zPks8p8=)
|
## [Share Your Story](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/6285105/56911110/163234627?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDM2YjZiZC1iOTY2LWU5MTEtYjQ5ZS0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ATdVSBBrkRAedih8i7SXlfBiWv1BjxsrFZK8zPks8p8=)
---

I have several friends who work as independent contractors and have serious medical conditions; without the ACA, they would not be able to afford life-saving treatment and medication. I have several more friends who did not have health insurance until the ACA subsidies were put in place.

And then there is my cousin Sam, who I grew up with. Sam lives with liver disease. He is a medical doctor, and had employer-provided insurance when he learned he needed a liver transplant. Despite his status as a professional, despite what many of us would consider to be a “great” private insurance plan, he was soon placed in a terrible position: the insurance would cover the cost of the transplant for him but not for the liver donor.

This is the type of absurd and cruel situation that occurs far too often in the United States. By offering to pay the medical costs for the recipient of a transplant, but not for the donor, the insurance company essentially told Sam: live and face bankruptcy, or die. The medical costs for the donor, who had to undergo extensive testing, and who faced surgery and extended recovery, ran in the hundreds of thousands of dollars. Sam, like most Americans, did not have access to this type of money.

Luckily, Sam had access to Obamacare. Although it resulted in an unnecessary and risky delay, Sam was able to purchase insurance through the ACA exchange, obtain coverage for himself and his liver donor, receive a healthy liver, and live to tell the tale.

Now, the Affordable Care Act is not a perfect law, and I support efforts to take the next step as a society and guarantee universal healthcare. Until we take the vote to implement Medicare for All, however, we need to protect the ACA and what it accomplishes for our country.

After the Democratic Party gained forty seats in the House of Representatives in 2018, and after the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committed placed Rep. McCaul on an “early retirement” list for 2020, I can understand why he might regret his prior votes.

But those of us who depend on the Affordable Care Act—who wouldn’t have our loved ones but for this important law—we won’t forget.

In solidarity,
Mike Siegel

body:
Indiana Republican Party Chairman Kyle Hupfer today called on South Bend Mayor Pete Buttigieg to immediately release five hidden tapes at the... | | |
---
[View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/indiana-gop-mayor-buttigieg-release-the-hidden-police-tapes-today?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=78964f287a&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
**Contact:** Pete Seat, 520-990-4067, pseat@indiana.gop **Date:** April 24, 2019
**Indiana GOP: Mayor Buttigieg, Release the Hidden Police Tapes Today**
_Following New Court Ruling, Indiana GOP Calls for Release of South Bend Tapes_
**INDIANAPOLIS** – Indiana Republican Party Chairman Kyle Hupfer today called on South Bend Mayor Pete Buttigieg to immediately release five hidden tapes at the center of a seven-year long court battle over the firing of the city’s first-ever African-American police chief, following a [new court ruling](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f1944a01f8&e=1acd9bb3d6) that the case can now proceed to trial.

**“Mayor Buttigieg has wasted millions of taxpayer dollars in a seven-year effort to keep these tapes secret and hidden from the public,”** said Chairman Hupfer. **“This court battle has gone on long enough and cost far too much. Mayor Buttigieg should release the tapes immediately before it costs the city even a penny more.”**

Just days after becoming mayor of South Bend, one of his first actions in office was to fire Police Chief Darryl Boykins, the city's first ever African-American police chief. Boykins vowed to fight his dismissal by Buttigieg, while the South Bend Common Council has also fought to make the tapes public.

Buttigieg and his then-chief of staff (and now campaign manager) were sued by the former police chief for “[racial animus](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=06254e6733&e=1acd9bb3d6).” This lawsuit and the case eventually led to multiple settlements and a court battle that has cost the City of South Bend at least $2 million to date.

Hupfer added, **“Buttigieg calls the firing of his police chief his ‘first serious mistake’ as mayor. But when a president makes a mistake, it cannot simply be brushed off. Presidents handle life-and-death decisions, with the future of America on the line each and every time. As president, actions have consequences and can’t simply be tossed aside as the ‘first serious mistake’ once in office.**

**It’s time for Mayor Buttigieg to accept responsibility for his actions and immediately release the tapes.”** ###

Friends -
This Saturday, at thousands of events nationwide, Bernie supporters will come together for our official Organizing Kickoff.
It’s going to be a big day for our campaign – but we noticed there isn’t currently an event in your area. So today we’d like to ask if you can host one.

This Saturday, we will come together all across the country to send an unmistakable message: Bernie Sanders is the best candidate to defeat Trump and our movement is ready to do the work to make it happen.
As a host you will be a crucial part of that effort. Growing our movement in your neighborhood starts with you.
In solidarity,
Team Bernie

subject: Boom: Hispanics Lead Housing, Income Surge, Poverty at Record Low
body:
"Latinos are finding their economic legs under the Trump administration, leading the surge in home ownership and income growth..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=45136ca59c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Boom: Hispanics Lead Housing, Income Surge, Poverty at Record Low**

“Latinos are finding their economic legs under the Trump administration, leading the surge in home ownership and income growth and record low poverty rates, according to two comprehensive new surveys,” Paul Bedard reports in the _Washington Examiner_.

Hispanics “have seen their third consecutive year of income growth and have a higher workplace participation rate . . . Within the next five years, Hispanic median income will triple,” according to the National Association of Hispanic Real Estate Professionals.

[See 7 big trends for Latinos under President Trump.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=661fe8deca&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “The S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite had their highest closings on record Tuesday, marking a resurgence for the stock market,” Michael Wursthorn and Jessica Menton report for _[The Wall Street Journal](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=33566241c3&e=3ee4985eea)_. “The S&P 500 is up 17%, its best kickoff to a year since 1987, while the Nasdaq has gained 22%, its best start since 1991.”
---
|
---
| “As Lockheed Martin readies production of the F-16 at its new home in Greenville, unexpectedly high demand for the fighter jet has officials saying up to 400 people will be hired for the work,” Anna Mitchell writes for _[Greenville News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8c7b362cfc&e=3ee4985eea)_. “When we are able to do a ribbon cutting like this, it means great jobs, great wages for this community, but it also strengthens our alliances around the world,” White House Director of Trade and Manufacturing Policy Peter Navarro said.
---
|
---
| “A massive caravan of approximately 10,000 migrants traveling through Mexico in hopes of reaching the United States is expected to arrive in Mexico City this week, according to local media reports on the group's movements,” Anna Giaritelli reports in the _[Washington Examiner](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=04ff1cb819&e=3ee4985eea)_. “The group has been described by Mexico's Interior Secretary Olga Sanchez Cordero as ‘caravana madre,’ which has been widely referred to as the ‘mother of all caravans’ in American media.”
---
|
---
| U.S. Border Patrol officials found an abandoned toddler with only a phone number written on his shoes near the U.S.–Mexico border yesterday, Julia Ainsley reports for [NBC News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2dcbe4bd9e&e=3ee4985eea). “Rudy Karish, the chief Border Patrol agent in the Rio Grande Valley, said he believes the boy was left by smugglers.”
---
|

There's a question that comes up whenever we talk about big, structural change: _How are you going to pay for it?_

Well, I've got a plan, and here's a part of it: the Ultra-Millionaire Tax. It's just two cents on every dollar of the great fortunes above $50 million. Just two cents! And an extra cent on fortunes over $1 billion.

It's about asking the people with those great fortunes to spend just a minute to remember how they got it.

They built that great business, or their families did, using workers that all of us helped pay to educate.

They got their goods to market using roads and bridges that all of us helped pay to build.

They were protected in their factories with firefighters and police officers that all of us helped to pay.

Good for them. But now that they've got that great fortune, they've got to pay something back so everybody else gets a chance.

And here's how the money works out:

**If we put the Ultra-Millionaire Tax in place for the 75,000 largest fortunes in the country, we can do Universal Child Care and early education, do universal free public college, and cancel student loan debt for 42 million Americans.

All that -- and we'd still have nearly a trillion dollars left over.

I'll keep fighting to make sure the rich and powerful pay their fair share so we can make the investments we've got to make as a country.**

**[But I can't do it alone. I'm deeply grateful that you're on this team. If you can, make your first contribution right now to keep powering this grassroots movement:](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fd1b/45c30650/8a5f9665/6697ca09/4079295413/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWFwcjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNDI0ZW0xLWZ1bGwtYiJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-apr19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=20190424em1-full-b")**

Elizabeth

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: standing up for victims
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | | Friend,

If someone is the victim of workplace harassment, they deserve to be heard. Full stop.

Unfortunately, there's currently no mechanism in place to stop harassers from using their power and privilege to hide their wrongdoings. Democrats in the House intend to fix that.

[**_The Be HEARD Act will shore up protections for victims of harassment in the workplace. Will you sign on in support of this important legislation?_**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c6e/622b7b5b/1f5ec35c/307b5d02/2028897599/VEsH/ "https://www.paction.us/be-heard/dws-congress?utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=1+-+The+Be+HEARD+Act+will+shore+up+protectio&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_JA_90DO_190424_1_1&source=DWS_EM_JA_90DO_190424_1_1")

[](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c6e/622b7b5b/1f5ec35c/307b5d05/2028897599/VEsE/ "https://www.paction.us/be-heard/dws-congress?utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_JA_90DO_190424_1_1&source=DWS_EM_JA_90DO_190424_1_1")
This legislation, of which I am a co-sponsor, will extend the statute of limitations for reporting, require workplaces to adopt a non-harassment policy, and establish a program to ensure low-wage workers are able to access legal counsel.

[**_It 's the right thing to do. Join us in supporting the Be HEARD Act._**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c6e/622b7b5b/1f5ec35c/307b5d04/2028897599/VEsF/ "https://www.paction.us/be-heard/dws-congress?utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=3+-+Itrsquos+the+right+thing+to+do+Join+us+i&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_JA_90DO_190424_1_1&source=DWS_EM_JA_90DO_190424_1_1")

Thank you,

Debbie

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Florida, 1427 Piedmont Drive E
body:
During the campaign -- because you asked for it -- we printed shirts that said, "we have his back." And it's true. You all have ALWAYS had my back, no matter what the other side threw at me -- and the
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb35a1/9e00690/6bbc6226/24075270/304178119/VEsH/ "https://forwardfla.com")
Friend --
During the campaign -- because you asked for it -- we printed shirts that said, "we have his back." And it's true. You all have ALWAYS had my back, no matter what the other side threw at me -- and they threw a lot.

Earlier today, we put a lot of that to rest when an Ethics Commission Advocate asked that we end the ethics charges levied against me.

The results confirm what I've said all along -- facts matter and I never knowingly violated any ethics laws. Once I was made aware of one issue, just like I've done during my 14 years in public service, I took responsibility. I appreciate that the Ethics Commission Advocate agreed to the facts, including that there was no evidence to support four of the original allegations, and requested to settle this matter today.

And now it's time to get back to our mission at hand -- registering and re-engaging **[one million new Florida voters before 2020](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb35a1/9e00690/6bbc6226/24075273/304178119/VEsE/ "http://www.forwardfla.com")** and am proud to have you with me in this fight. We will not stop.

Thank you for always having my back.

\- Andrew

Hi,
Last week, we reached out because we desperately need signatures to send a message to Donald Trump and the GOP that we MUST protect access to affordable health care.
We just checked and it looks like your name is missing. [**Will you please click here to add your name to tell Republicans to stop attacking access to health care?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc293/2a380d31/38e1d20c/f11777/252058551/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/protect-the-ACA/?code=Hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F2019_protect-the-aca-up%3Frefcode%3De20190417_acaja_all")
They're trying to gut the Affordable Care Act (yes, the whole thing) in federal court, so we can't waste any time.
Thanks for making your voice heard,
Team Maggie
_\---------------Original Message---------------_
Team --
Recent Affordable Care Act headlines are incredibly alarming. Take this one, from the Washington Post: _" Trump administration asks court to completely invalidate Obama's Affordable Care Act."_
You're reading this correctly: **The Trump administration is trying to fully repeal the Affordable Care Act in its entirety in federal court.**
The stakes are extremely high, everyone, and we need all hands on deck.** [Will you please sign our petition calling on the Trump administration to stop attacking health care?](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc293/2a380d31/38e1d20c/f11777/252058551/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/protect-the-ACA/?code=Hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F2019_protect-the-aca-up%3Frefcode%3De20190417_acaja_all")**
If Trump is successful, it could mean that people with pre-existing conditions will lose their badly-needed protections. But it's not just people with pre-existing conditions who would be vulnerable -- millions of Americans could lose their coverage altogether.
Look, Senator Hassan believes that everyone deserves access to the care they need to get and stay healthy. And, she believes that it should be affordable. That's why she's been fighting day in and day out to protect these fundamental rights -- and to make sure that no one ends up with a surprise medical bill in the process.
[**Senator Hassan needs to know that you 're with her in this fight, so will you please add your name to our petition and call on President Trump to stop attacking health care?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc293/2a380d31/38e1d20c/f11777/252058551/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/protect-the-ACA/?code=Hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F2019_protect-the-aca-up%3Frefcode%3De20190417_acaja_all")
Thank you for speaking up,
Team Maggie

name: Mary
subject: Casada's tactics: bullying, bribery, and intimidation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
Dear Peter,

To pass their disgraceful private school voucher scheme through the state house yesterday afternoon, Republican Gov. Bill Lee and Speaker Glen Casada set a new low for the Tennessee legislature, making a mockery of our legislative process by rigging a vote, intimidating members, and silencing the opposition.

Gov. Lee offered up last-minute pork projects for legislators to bring home to their district in exchange for their vote.

After the bill initially failed, Speaker Casada held the vote open for 30 minutes while he took Republican lawmakers to a back room one-by-one until one of them cracked and switched their vote.

For the entire floor debate, Speaker Glen Casada refused to call on Rep. Gloria Johnson -- a 28-year public school teacher.

We’re proud that Tennessee House Democrats stood firm in opposition to Gov. Lee’s school voucher program since the day it was introduced.

But our opposition alone won’t save public education.

That's why we're launching a digital campaign targeting every Republican who abandoned our children and voted for vouchers just to appease Betsy DeVos, Glen Casada, and their high-dollar, out-state voucher lobbyists.

Can you contribute today to help fund our digital campaign to protect public education and hold spineless Republican legislators accountable?

Thank you for your continued support.

Mary

--

Mary Mancini

Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

name: Jim Zogby, Our Revolution
subject: Signatures needed: Tell the DCCC to stop the anti-democratic blacklist policy for progressive primary challengers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
Tomorrow, Our Revolution activists in Illinois will deliver thousands of petition signatures to the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) Chair Cheri Bustos.
# [](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a510/bed43eb/98a765b2/75fb5ab2/2433895064/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-header-OR&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=JZ&source=JZ")
Friends,
Tomorrow, Our Revolution activists in Illinois will deliver thousands of petition signatures to the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) Chair Cheri Bustos. It's been a busy couple of weeks, so allow me a moment to get you up to speed on what's going on, and how you can help.
[**First, we need you to sign the petition to stop the DCCC from rigging primaries for Democratic incumbents. Over 28,000 people have already signed, and we're trying to get as close to 35,000 signatures as possible before tomorrow.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a510/bed43eb/98a765b2/75fb5abd/2433895064/VEsE/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/dccc-primary-blacklist?source=em190424-jz-6m-ps&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=2+-+First+we+need+you+to+sign+the+petition+t&utm_campaign=JZ")
**[ADD YOUR NAME»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a510/bed43eb/98a765b2/75fb5abc/2433895064/VEsF/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/dccc-primary-blacklist?source=em190424-jz-6m-ps&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=3+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME+raquo&utm_campaign=JZ")**
We are delivering signatures to end the anti-democratic DCCC policy that was formalized last month. **Starting this year the DCCC will "blacklist" consultants, firms, and vendors who work with primary challengers to Democratic House incumbents.** They will not be permitted to work with other Democratic congressional candidates. So the teams who helped elect Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Rep. Ro Khanna, and many others are now being punished for challenging the establishment.
This goes against the very nature of our democracy. Incumbents are being protected, even when their policies are out of step with their constituents. The Democratic Party is hurting itself with this policy, but more importantly, it is hurting millions of Americans who need radical change right now.
I have seen firsthand how you speaking out has moved the Democratic Party in a more progressive direction. As a member of the DNC Unity Reform Committee, we took your input that the party must be more democratic, transparent and accountable. Thanks to your organizing, we were successful in ending the undemocratic influence of so-called "superdelegates" during the presidential primaries.
**[Our democracy is stronger when we have robust primaries. Add your name to tell the DCCC to stop their policy that blacklists the teams who help primary challengers win elections. Our Revolution activists will deliver your signature to the DCCC tomorrow.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a510/bed43eb/98a765b2/75fb5abf/2433895064/VEsC/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/dccc-primary-blacklist?source=em190424-jz-6m-ps&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=4+-+Our+democracy+is+stronger+when+we+have+r&utm_campaign=JZ")**
Thank you for speaking up on this important matter.
In Solidarity,
Jim Zogby
Board Member
Our Revolution
**[ADD YOUR NAME»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a510/bed43eb/98a765b2/75fb5abe/2433895064/VEsD/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/dccc-primary-blacklist?source=em190424-jz-6m-ps&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=5+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME+raquo&utm_campaign=JZ")**
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. PO Box 66208, Washington, DC 20035
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a510/bed43eb/98a765b2/75fb5ab9/2433895064/VEsA/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=6+-+update+your+info&utm_campaign=JZ"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a510/bed43eb/98a765b2/75fb5ab8/2433895064/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=7+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=JZ"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a510/bed43eb/98a765b2/75fb5abb/2433895064/VEsO/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=8+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=JZ&source=JZ"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a510/bed43eb/98a765b2/75fb5aba/2433895064/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=9+-+contributing+to+Our+Revolution+here&utm_campaign=JZ&source=JZ").

**[Don't wait until this batch runs out--chip in any amount (even $1!) to get yours now.](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771685/691c9bd/6cb11d6d/11a4ae7b/3643687270/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-sticker-apr?refcode=em_fr_20190424_TH_20190424-fr-TH-stickers-ndnr_ndnr_l1&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771685/691c9bd/6cb11d6d/11a4ae78/3643687270/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-sticker-apr?refcode=em_fr_20190424_TH_20190424-fr-TH-stickers-ndnr_ndnr_i1&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

name: VOTING RIGHTS ALERT (via Voter Protection Project)
subject: Right-wing Supreme Court justices are gutting voting rights AGAIN
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
|
---
[ ](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0775/72412298/44431ca2/61015a5a/3892341981/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190424_SCOTUSVotingRights_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190424_SCOTUSVotingRights_U1_X1")

| | Peter -- Six years ago, the conservative justices on the Supreme Court completely gutted the Voting Rights Act. Now, they're pretending to care about upholding the law to further enable their partisan agenda:- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - Peter -- Six years ago, the conservative justices on the Supreme Court completely gutted the Voting Rights Act. **_Now, they 're pretending to care about upholding the law to further enable their partisan agenda:_** [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0775/72412298/44431ca2/61015a5d/3892341981/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/us_census?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190424_SCOTUSVotingRights_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190424_SCOTUSVotingRights_U1_X1") The conservative justices seem poised to uphold the Trump Administration's decision to add a citizenship question to the Census, claiming that they're just trying to protect the VRA... But Justice Sonia Sotomayor and officials at the ACLU are saying that the addition could discourage MILLIONS of people from filling out the Census, especially in the Hispanic community. Here's the thing: information from the Census determines the amount of federal funding and electoral votes states receive, and the way districts are drawn. [**_An inaccurate census can spell disaster for voting rights, so it 's imperative that we stand with advocates of enfranchisement against this attack--can you fill in your E-Signature in advance of the Supreme Court's June vote? >>_**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0775/72412298/44431ca2/61015a5c/3892341981/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/us_census?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+An+inaccurate+census+can+spell+disaster+&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190424_SCOTUSVotingRights_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190424_SCOTUSVotingRights_U1_X1") | | | [Add your name >>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0775/72412298/44431ca2/61015a5f/3892341981/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/us_census?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4+-+Add+your+name+gtgt&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190424_SCOTUSVotingRights_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190424_SCOTUSVotingRights_U1_X1")
---
The Census is a nonpartisan institution, and we need to uphold its accuracy at all costs.
-- The Voter Protection Project

| [Voter Protection Project](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0775/72412298/44431ca2/61015a5e/3892341981/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=5+-+Voter+Protection+Project&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190424_SCOTUSVotingRights_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190424_SCOTUSVotingRights_U1_X1")

We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, [click here.](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0775/72412298/44431ca2/61015a43/3892341981/VEsO/ "https://voterprotect.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=8+-+click+here&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190424_SCOTUSVotingRights_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_190424_SCOTUSVotingRights_U1_X1")

subject: President Trump and First Lady join leaders in America’s war on drug abuse
body:
This afternoon, President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump addressed the Rx Drug Abuse and Heroin Summit in Atlanta, Georgia. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9fe77657b9&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • April 24, 2019
---
| | |
# **President Trump and First Lady join leaders in America’s war on drug abuse**

**This afternoon,** President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump addressed the Rx Drug Abuse and Heroin Summit in Atlanta, Georgia. The annual event brings together practitioners and stakeholders from the front lines of the war on drug abuse.

**Past Presidents have attended** the summit, but today President Trump was able to share evidence of real progress from his Administration’s fight to end the opioid epidemic.
🎬 **Watch** : **[President Trump says everyone united by same vital goal](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ba605173f7&e=3ee4985eea)**
**The Trump Administration** has unveiled numerous programs across the Government since President Trump launched his Initiative to Stop Opioid Abuse last year. Those efforts include securing $6 billion in funding, increasing law enforcement efforts through the Department of Justice, and signing the bipartisan SUPPORT Act into law.

**Another crucial part** of the President’s plan is to cut off the flow of illicit drugs before they flood into our communities. The Department of Homeland Security recently seized 1.2 billion lethal doses of fentanyl over a single 12-month period—enough of the deadly drug to kill every American _four times over_. President Trump’s efforts to secure our border and crack down on illegal distributors are drying up this lucrative drug supply.

**The death toll** from this “crisis next door" is nothing short of a national tragedy, but there are signs of progress from the Administration’s massive push. In the President’s first year in office, 68 percent fewer Americans over the age of 26 began using heroin than in the previous year. Meanwhile, U.S. Customs and Border Protection seizures of fentanyl alone are up 265 percent over the last two full fiscal years.

“**We will not** solve this epidemic overnight,” the President told leaders in the fight against drug abuse today in Atlanta. But “we will never stop until our job is done.”

[Join other Americans and share your story from the crisis next door.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b20d96e141&e=3ee4985eea)

**Watch:**[First Lady says we will replace the bond of addiction with the bond of love](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=127b1c0681&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **The American car industry is back. Let’s keep it that way.**

**This afternoon,** Vice President Mike Pence traveled to the Ford Motor Company’s Dearborn Truck Plant in Detroit, Michigan. It’s the same factory town that has produced some of the most iconic Ford automobile lines in American history, from the Model A and Mustang to the newer F-150.

**Today, the plant** is home to some 7,500 employees—each one of them using innovative techniques to help develop America’s next generation of cars.

**“The automotive industry** is the backbone of American manufacturing today,” Vice President Pence told workers. “The [United States–Mexico–Canada trade agreement] will finally give workers the level playing field and be able to compete and win on a global stage as never before.” The USMCA, which President Trump negotiated late last year, will replace NAFTA once it is approved by Congress.

[Vice President Pence: New trade agreement puts auto industry first](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=658c7eb407&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
